title: ferray-linalg: eigh missing UPLO= parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.linalg.eigh(a, UPLO='L') and np.linalg.eigvalsh(a, UPLO='L') let you specify which triangle of the symmetric matrix to read. ferray-linalg's eigh() always uses faer::Side::Lower. Add UPLO parameter to eigh and eigvalsh.
